rqs: What are the average-case time complexities of Quick Sort and Merge Sort on random input arrays of varying sizes?
Which algorithm, Quick Sort or Merge Sort, exhibits lower worst-case time complexity for nearly sorted datasets?
In which scenarios does Quick Sort outperform Merge Sort in terms of time complexity on large-scale data sets?
arxiv_query: (all:"Quick Sort" OR all:"Merge Sort") AND (all:"Time Complexity")
